summary: Implemented ADR 0187 on the workstream branch, live-applied the managed seed snapshot store to backup-lv3, published and remotely verified the tiny, standard, and recovery anonymized seed snapshots, and hardened the fixture and restore automation after exercising those paths live.

verification.observed: The merged ADR 0187 test slice `uv run --with pytest python -m pytest tests/test_seed_data_snapshots.py tests/test_fixture_manager.py tests/test_restore_verification.py tests/test_restore_verification_windmill.py tests/test_vmid_allocator.py -q` returned `30 passed`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh data-models` and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards` succeeded, and `make syntax-check-backup-vm` passed on the workstream branch.

The production replay `BOOTSTRAP_KEY=/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/platform_server/.local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519 make configure-backup-vm env=production` completed successfully after promoting shared backup-vm datastore facts into inventory state, and `backup-lv3` now exposes `/var/lib/lv3/seed-data-snapshots/{tiny,standard,recovery}`.

verification.check: Seed snapshot publish and remote verification
verification.observed: Published snapshots `tiny-4927754bef12`, `standard-428b539a2848`, and `recovery-c0de4262df4c` were copied to `backup-lv3` with `make seed-snapshot-publish ...`, and `uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/seed_data_snapshots.py verify --seed-class <class> --snapshot-id <id> --remote` checksum-verified each remote directory under `/var/lib/lv3/seed-data-snapshots/<class>/`.

Live fixture and restore runs were driven far enough to validate the repo automation changes: `seed-staging-smoke` cloned VM `910`, booted it, and accepted SSH through the Proxmox jump host; `restore_verification.py --seed-class tiny --seed-snapshot-id tiny-4927754bef12 --print-report-json` restored VMIDs `900` and `901`, reached QEMU guest-agent checks inside the restored guest, and confirmed the seed-staging hooks and receipt wiring.

notes: The `fixture_manager.py create ops-base` live path remains blocked by a separate template-catalog gap: template `lv3-ops-base` with VMID `9003` is still declared in repo metadata but is not present on the live Proxmox host.

The `seed-staging-smoke` fixture proved the staged-guest path and SSH reachability, but the older OpenTofu-based create flow stayed stuck in `Creating...` after the VM already existed; the merged branch now keeps the newer mainline direct `qm clone` fixture lifecycle while preserving ADR 0187 seed staging.

The restore verification workflow restored and booted the target guests, but restored-guest SSH banner readiness was still too slow to finish a full receipt during the branch-local live session; that gap is operationally adjacent to ADR 0187 rather than a seed snapshot content failure.
Protected integration files remained untouched on the initial workstream branch live apply and are finalized only during the merged-main replay.
